system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against TN 8
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You adopt a meditative stance and inhale, raising your arms up and down in quick but powerful motions. Dark claws grow from your fingertips and your eyes burn with a white light. On a Success you grow claws. These do 1d10 Damage per Rank of Qi and lasts 5 rounds. Cathartic: Functions like normal, but the claws are even more ferocious, using your internal energy to rend your enemies. This enables you to do 1d10 Open Damage per Rank of Qi. If your Attacks land Total Successes, you roll on the critical injury table below instead of doing normal Damage. This is a very potent, and insidious Technique that few have truly mastered. Each Cathartic use causes you to take double the Imbalance Points you would normally gain. In addition after the power leaves you, your Qi is imbalanced and your current and max Wounds are halved for the next two hours.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.consequenceNote: After the power leaves, current and maximum Wounds are halved for the next two hours.
